payload.answer: Extracted the explicitly stated architecture preferences and open questions as atomic memory cards.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity disambiguation was explicitly required by the input.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent.
Whether Telegram should be added later is still an open question.
Which model is cheapest while saturating performance is still an open question.

details: Used commit_with_warning because two items are unresolved open questions.

repair_options: If desired, split the open questions into separate decision-tracking cards once a choice is made.
If the system has canonical entity IDs, map Brain DB, Cognee, Slack, and Telegram to those IDs.
